codeReview.summary: Manual scrutiny review confirmed the final-hardening packet improved seed/runtime safety without weakening the validated mission surface: validation seeding became explicit and password-policy guarded, the reset harness became portable and self-verifying, and the review-driven regression realignments stayed backed by targeted CODE-RED, runtime, and live login checks.

summary: Pass. Final-hardening recovery delivered safer seeded runtime wiring and preserved validation proof with passing targeted suites, manifest, and live login checks.
